extracted.summary: Source watcher detected a possible update for BIS National Building Code. Review the source before merging new facts into BuildSetu knowledge.
checklist: Compare updated content with previous known version
Create or update reviewed knowledge entry

processSteps: Reviewed update is merged into agent knowledge
cautions: This is an update alert, not automatically trusted knowledge.
Do not treat detected source change as final regulation until reviewed.
blockedClaims: Do not claim updated legal/building-code requirements without review.
